visual_observations.composition_style: product flat lay — Cosmic Queen Glow Primer on clean background

text_overlays.content_summary: كوزميك كوين غلو برايمر — Cosmic Queen Glow Primer with skin-loving ingredients, hydration + smoothing

notable_visual_elements: 'كوزميك كوين' (Cosmic Queen) = bold English-origin brand naming in Arabic
ingredient listing in copy — clean beauty transparency
flat lay product photography — catalog style

voice_observations.caption_text:
بتركيبة غنية بمكونات محبّة للبشرة، كوزميك كوين غلو برايمر يرطّب، ينعّم، ويمنحك قاعدة مضيئة تدوم طوال اليوم. 

 Powered by skin-loving ingredients,  Cosmic Queen Glow Primer hydrates, smooths, and creates the perfect luminous base that lasts all day.

cultural_notes.free_notes: Product name 'Cosmic Queen' in Arabic transcription signals premium/aspirational branding. 'محبّة للبشرة' (skin-loving) is a Saudi beauty market phrase for clean/gentle ingredients.

pattern_matches.notes: Primer flat lay — catalog-style product showcase with ingredient focus
Ingredient transparency positioning — clean beauty brand values
